tagline: SMS marketing platform built for Shopify brands

pricingIntel.summary: Usage-based SMS pricing. Plans scale with subscriber count and message volume
details: Pricing based on subscriber count + message credits
Postscript Plus (managed service) available as premium add-on
costDrivers: Subscriber list size. primary pricing lever
Message volume. SMS credits consumed per campaign and flow
Add-ons. Postscript Plus managed service, CashBack, AI Infinity Testing

benefits.label: Attributed Revenue (SMS)
benefits.description: SMS flows and campaigns. Automated flows (welcome, abandoned cart, post-purchase, winback) and targeted campaigns generate attributable revenue from your SMS subscriber list.

revenuePerSmsSubscriber.label: Monthly revenue per SMS subscriber
revenuePerSmsSubscriber.source: industry benchmark ($1-3/subscriber/month for active SMS programs)

benefits.label: List Growth Revenue
benefits.description: Onsite opt-in tools. Postscript's popups, checkout collection, and 130M+ subscriber network grow your SMS list faster than building it yourself. New subscribers generate revenue from day one.

optInRate.label: % of site visitors who opt in to SMS
optInRate.source: dtcmvp estimate (Postscript claims 6x list growth, typical onsite opt-in: 1-4%)

revenuePerNewSubscriber.label: First-month revenue per new SMS subscriber
revenuePerNewSubscriber.source: dtcmvp estimate (conservative. new subscribers convert lower than established list)

benefits.label: Flow Optimization
benefits.description: AI-driven SMS lift. AI Infinity Testing continuously optimizes your flows (subject lines, timing, copy), adding incremental revenue on top of your baseline.

revenuePerSmsSubscriber.label: Monthly revenue per SMS subscriber (baseline)
revenuePerSmsSubscriber.source: same as SMS flow revenue baseline

aiLiftPct.label: % revenue lift from AI optimization
aiLiftPct.source: dtcmvp estimate (Postscript claims 'average 20% increase' on highest-ROI flows, discounted to 15%)

sources: Postscript claims: '34x Return on Investment on SMS Spend'
Postscript claims: '+22% Online revenue attributed to Postscript SMS'
Postscript claims: '6x YoY list growth rate since introducing Onsite Opt-in'
Postscript claims: 'average 20% increase in revenue on your highest ROI flows' (AI Infinity Testing)

narrative.headline: Postscript could add {totalValue}/yr in SMS revenue for {brandName}.

byDepartment.Retention / CRM: For {contactName} on the retention side: SMS is the highest-engagement owned channel. Postscript's flow builder and AI optimization drive {revenueTotal}/yr from {brandName}'s subscriber list. The list growth tools mean the value compounds over time as more customers opt in.
byDepartment.Marketing / Growth: For {contactName} and the marketing team: SMS is a net-new revenue channel that complements email. Postscript's 34x claimed ROI on SMS spend puts it among the highest-return marketing investments available to {brandName}.
byDepartment.Ecommerce / DTC: For {contactName} on the ecom side: Postscript turns your SMS list into a revenue channel. The {revenueTotal}/yr estimate includes flow revenue, campaign revenue, and the value of new subscribers acquired through onsite opt-in.
byDepartment.Founder & CEO: For {contactName}: Postscript adds {totalValue}/yr to {brandName} through SMS marketing. At your {targetMultiple} target, the ceiling is {maxMonthly}/mo.
byDepartment.Other: Postscript adds {totalValue}/yr to {brandName} through SMS flows, campaigns, and list growth tools.

byCategory.Apparel & Fashion: Apparel brands see strong SMS performance for new drops, restocks, and flash sales. The urgency of SMS drives faster conversion on time-sensitive launches that email alone cannot match for {brandName}.
byCategory.Beauty & Cosmetics: Beauty brands benefit from SMS for product launches, limited editions, and restock alerts. The personal, direct nature of SMS fits the relationship-driven buying behavior in beauty.
byCategory.Food & Drink: Food and beverage brands see high SMS engagement because of repeat-purchase cadences and subscription reminders. SMS opt-in rates tend to be above average for food brands.
byCategory.Other: SMS performance varies by category but the mechanics are universal: higher open rates than email, faster time-to-purchase, and a direct line to your most engaged customers.

notes: Postscript is SMS-first, unlike Klaviyo which bundles email + SMS. The SWAG focuses on SMS-specific value. Brands already on Klaviyo SMS should compare the incremental value of a dedicated SMS platform vs. bundled.
